source.clause_quote: processed in a manner that ensures appropriate security of the personal data, including protection against unauthorised or unlawful processing ... using appropriate technical or organisational measures

obligations.requirement: Personal data must not be written to application logs; PII-named fields appearing in log/print calls are a security-of-processing risk.

fix.guidance: Redact or omit the PII field before logging (log an id or a masked value instead).

source.clause_quote: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller the erasure of personal data concerning him or her without undue delay

obligations.requirement: A project that processes personal data must provide a path to erase a data subject's personal data on request.

check.prompt_template: Given that this project handles personal data, judge whether it appears to provide a data-deletion/erasure path. Flag a violation only if there is positive evidence that deletion is impossible or absent.

fix.guidance: Implement and document a deletion path so erasure requests can be honored.
